title: ononis natrix var. hispanica
intro: Ononis natrix var. hispanica, also known as Spanish restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems contain a number of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Spanish restharrow are said to include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
